MINI MINUTES:

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - ATTY. JOEL M. WESTBROOK'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE CROSS-DEFENDANT SHAMROCK STRUCTURES, INCORPORATED is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Not reported. =302/CK

Off Calendar Feb-01-2012 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEGER PHILLIPS JOHNSON APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. LAURA S. FLYNN & ATTY. J. STEPHANIE KRMPOTIC OF LOW BALL & LYNCH, TEL. NO. 981-6630 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT TRANSWORLD CONSTRUCTION, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. The opposing party provided courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 B prior to the hearing. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SUSTAIN ITS INITIAL BURDEN OF PRODUCTION BY EITHER NEGATING THE ALLEGATIONS OF THE COMPLAINT OR SHOWING OR PRESENTING EVIDENCE THAT HE DOES NOT HAVE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)
